title: Hallow Road
tmdbOverview: Two parents enter a race against time when they receive a distressing late-night phone call from their daughter after she caused a tragic car accident.
synopsis: Hallow Road (2025) is a mystery, thriller and horror film from United Kingdom and United States. It carries a 6.0 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
